title: Sentiment Auto-Scan Config
description: Persisted at ctx.dataDir/config.json (plugins/sentiment-autoscan/data/config.json) once phase 2/3 wire up persistence.

enabled.description: Turns the auto-scan scheduler on/off. Off by default — owner opts in explicitly.

intervalMinutes.description: How often to auto-run a scan, in minutes. Owner-set, no forced default — null means auto-scan is not configured yet (manual scan-now still works).

sources.description: Which inputs feed the sentiment brief.

highImpactLeadMinutes.description: Minutes-before-event threshold for high-impact economic events (CPI/FOMC/NFP) that qualifies for a broadcast.

broadcastEnabled.description: When true, push a plugin.event broadcast + office feed post once a high-impact event crosses highImpactLeadMinutes.
